message:
fix(loader): deduplicate issues by ID, keeping last occurrence

JSONL files can contain multiple lines with the same issue ID (e.g.,
from append-based updates). Without dedup, both entries get graph nodes
but id_to_index only maps to the last, causing data inconsistency.

Add deduplicate_issues() that keeps the later occurrence and warns on
duplicates. Applied to both load_issues_from_file and
parse_issues_from_text. Includes 4 unit tests.

Closes bd-dlk7.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
